heading: Short title
label: 20101 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “National Aeronautics and Space Act”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20101(no source)Chapter 201 of title 51 restates the National Aeronautics and Space Act of 1958. Although short titles are generally eliminated as unnecessary in positive law titles of the United States Code, in this case it was suggested that the short title “National Aeronautics and Space Act” be provided for convenience.
